title: helianthemum pugae
intro: Helianthemum pugae, also known as Rockrose or Frostweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Cistaceae and is native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and promote healing. The health benefits of Helianthemum pugae include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Helianthemum pugae include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
